= Contents =
      - [[#batch modifying attributes|batch modifying attributes]]

=== batch modifying attributes ===
{{{
find ./m4a -type f -name '*.m4a' -exec bash -c 'ffprobe -v error -select_streams a:0  -show_entries stream=bit_rate -of default=noprint_wrappers=1:nokey=1 "$1" | xargs -I % beet modify -y bitrate='%' "$1"; echo "$1"' _ {} \;
}}}
